revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data Cape Colony]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Cape Colony]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: ([[c:GR|GR]]) [[c:COM:Duplicate|Duplicate]]: [[File:Flag of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland (1801–1927).png]] → [[File:Flag of the United Kingdom (3-5).svg]] Exact or scaled-down duplicate: [[c::File:Flag of the United Kingdom (3-5).svg]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Cape Colony | flag alias = Flag of the Cape Colony (1876–1910).svg | flag alias-1795 = Flag of Great Britain (1707–1800).svg | flag alias-1801 = Flag of the United Kingdom (3-5).svg | link alias-naval = Royal Navy | flag alias-naval = Naval ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | link alias-naval-1795 = Royal Navy | flag alias-naval-1795 = Naval ensign of Great Britain (1707–1800).svg | link alias-navy = Royal Navy | flag alias-navy = Naval ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1795 | var2 = 1801 | related1 = South Africa | related2 = Union of South Africa | related3 = British Empire | related4 = United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland | related5 = South African Republic </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
